title: Academic Context 1
instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

sentences.text: After a careful _____ of the data, the researchers concluded that the hypothesis was correct.
The professor suggested a new _____ to solving the complex mathematical problem.
This particular _____ of science focuses on the behavior of subatomic particles.
The teacher made a fair _____ of each student's presentation based on established criteria.
We must not _____ that everyone understands these basic concepts without explanation.
The committee's _____ on this matter will be final and binding for all members.
The resources needed for this project are currently _____ for all team members.
Regular exercise provides numerous health _____ including improved cardiovascular function.
